name: get_architecture
description: Get high-level architecture overview — packages, services, dependencies, and project structure at a glance. Includes 'clusters': Leiden community detection over the call/import graph, surfacing the de-facto modules (each with a label, member count, cohesion score, representative top_nodes, and the packages/edge_types that bind it) — use these to grasp the real architectural seams, which often cut across the folder layout.
